reference: Hello. Having bile in your urine may require some monitoring and intervention, but in my opinion, there is nothing to worry about. If it has been established that the blood in your urine is not related to the urogenital system in any way, then there is nothing to worry about, ma'am. Best wishes.
text: Hello, having bile in your urine may require some monitoring and intervention, but in my opinion, there is nothing to worry about. If it has been established that the blood in your urine is not related to the urogenital system in any way, then there is nothing to worry about, ma'am. Best wishes.
